meta.defaultTitle: 1Panel: Open-Source VPS Control Panel | cPanel Alternative
meta.defaultDescription: 1Panel is an open-source VPS control panel. Deploy Ollama, manage Docker, one-click WordPress & OpenClaw. The modern cPanel alternative built for the AI era.
meta.ogDescription: The modern cPanel alternative. Deploy Ollama, run DeepSeek or Qwen locally, manage Docker, SSL, and websites — all from a clean web dashboard. Free and open source.

blog.pageDescription: Guides and updates on self-hosting, VPS management, Docker, local AI deployment, and open-source tools — from the 1Panel team.
blog.heading: Blog
blog.subheading: Guides and updates from the 1Panel team.
blog.fallbackToEnglish: This article is not yet available in your selected language. Showing the English version.

hero.subtitle: 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the cPanel alternative built for the AI era. Deploy local LLMs, manage Docker containers, and host agents and websites from one clean dashboard.
hero.pricingBannerText: Free OSS forever. Pro plans from $80/year.

features.title: Powerful
features.subtitle: Comprehensive VPS management features, making operations simple and efficient

openclaw.title: One-Click OpenClaw Deployment
openclaw.desc: Seamlessly deploy OpenClaw agents, host local LLMs via Ollama, and monitor GPU utilization—all within a unified workspace.

efficient.title: Efficient Management
efficient.desc: Through a user-friendly web graphical interface, 1Panel enables users to effortlessly manage their Linux servers. Key features include host monitoring, file management, database administration, container management, LLMs management.

website.title: Rapid Website Deployment
website.desc: With deep integration of the popular open-source website building software WordPress, 1Panel streamlines the process of domain binding and SSL certificate configuration, all achievable with just one click.

appStore.title: App Store
appStore.desc: 1Panel curates a wide range of high-quality open-source tools and applications, facilitating easy installation and updates for its users.

backup.title: Scheduled Backup
backup.desc: Support data backup to various cloud storage media scheduledly, and support recovery function, ensuring data is never lost.

secure.title: Secure and Reliable
secure.desc: 1Panel effectively reduces vulnerability exposure, provides virus protection, firewall, and log audit functions, ensuring system security.

appStore.title: Rich
appStore.subtitle: Curated high-quality open source applications with one-click installation and deployment to meet diverse business needs
appStore.noDataDesc: App store data is loading, please try again later

quickstart.title: Quick
quickstart.subtitle: One-click installation of 1Panel on your Linux server
quickstart.step1Desc1: Ensure you have a Linux server running, supporting CentOS, Ubuntu, Debian, and other mainstream distributions.
quickstart.step1Desc2: Supports various server architectures: x86_64, aarch64, armv7l, ppc64le, s390x.
quickstart.step2Desc: Run the one-click installation script as the root user to automatically download and install 1Panel.
quickstart.step3Desc: After installation, access the address provided by the installation script through a browser to start using 1Panel.

cta.title: Start Using
cta.subtitle: Take full control of your VPS

footer.companyDesc: LWware is responsible for the commercial operation of FIT2CLOUD's open-source projects 1Panel and JumpServer in the global market.

pricing.title: Simple
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No surprises.
pricing.metaTitle: 1Panel Pricing — Free tier available · Pro from $80/yr
pricing.metaDescription: 1Panel OSS is free forever: full open-source VPS control panel. Pro adds multi-node management, OpenClaw agents, advanced WAF, and priority support from $80/year per node. Compare OSS vs Pro and deploy on your Linux server.
pricing.perpetualVersionNote: Covers all V2 updates. Major version upgrades (V3+) will be offered at a discounted upgrade price.
pricing.trustLXwareLine: Sold & supported by {{lxware}}, the official commercial partner of 1Panel.
pricing.enterprisePrompt: Managing 10+ nodes or need a custom team quote?
pricing.proValueTitle: What you unlock with Pro Edition
pricing.proValueAiDesc: Deploy as many OpenClaw + MCP agents as you need
pricing.proValueNodeDesc: Manage all your servers from one unified dashboard
pricing.proValueSecDesc: Full WAF, anti-tampering, scheduled virus scanning
pricing.proValueWhiteLabelDesc: Custom logo, theme colors, and branding
pricing.compareIntro: Both editions include Docker, website management, databases, firewall, SSH, file management, app store, and scheduled tasks. The table below shows only where they differ.
pricing.faqSectionSubtitle: Licensing, trials, multi-node, and billing — answered.

trialBanner.text: 🎯 Try 1Panel Pro free for 30 days — no credit card required. Full access to all Pro features.

faq.trialQ: Is there a free trial for 1Panel Pro?
faq.trialA: Yes — a 30-day full-access trial is available at no cost, no credit card required. Email hi@lxware.hk to apply (use the subject line suggested by your mail app, or write “30-day Pro trial”). You'll receive a trial license key by email within one business day.
faq.subVsPerpQ: What's the difference between Subscription and Perpetual?
faq.subVsPerpA: Both give you the exact same Pro features. The only difference is payment model: Subscription ($80/yr) — lower upfront cost, always on the latest major version, cancel anytime. Perpetual ($200) — one-time payment, never expires for V2, costs less if you run it for 3+ years. Major version upgrades (e.g., V3) will be offered at a discounted price.
faq.v3Q: Does the Perpetual license include future major version updates?
faq.v3A: The Perpetual License covers all updates within V2. When a major new version (V3+) is released, existing perpetual license holders will be offered an upgrade at a discounted price — you won't need to purchase a full new license.
faq.devicesQ: Can one license be used on multiple devices at the same time?
faq.devicesA: One license is bound to one device at a time. You can deactivate it on the current device and reactivate it on another at any time during the license period.
faq.multiNodeA: Pro Edition gives you a unified console to manage multiple servers — switch between nodes, monitor them, run batch updates, and transfer files across nodes. See the NODE_DOCS_LINK for setup details.
faq.invoiceA: Yes. Electronic invoices are issued by email after purchase. Contact support@lxware.hk with your order details.
faq.lxwareQ: Why does checkout go to lxware.hk?
faq.lxwareA: 1Panel is open-source software maintained by the 1Panel team. {{lxware}} is the official commercial partner that handles Pro licensing, billing, and enterprise support. Your purchase and support are fully backed by LXware.
faq.nodeLimitQ: What does the license node limit control?
faq.nodeLimitA: The node limit on your Pro license defines how many Community edition nodes you can add under Node Management in 1Panel. Adding a community node consumes one slot from that quota.
faq.multiLicQ: Can I use multiple Pro licenses for different nodes?
faq.multiLicA: Yes. In License Management you can import and keep multiple Pro licenses. When you add a node as Pro edition, you assign an unbound Pro license to that node.
faq.reactivateQ: Can I deactivate and reactivate a license?
faq.reactivateA: Yes. You can deactivate it in the current app and reactivate it on another device during the license validity period.
faq.offlineQ: Can I activate in an offline environment?
faq.offlineA: Activation requires access to the license verification service. If direct access is unavailable, configure a network proxy.
faq.afterSalesQ: How do I contact after-sales support?

selfHosted.metaTitle: 1Panel Self-Hosted Solution - Take control of your VPS with 1Panel
selfHosted.metaDescription: 1Panel Self-Hosted Solution - A modern, open-source Linux server management panel that makes self-hosting simple and efficient.
selfHosted.heroSubtitle: Tired of expensive SaaS subscriptions and uncertain data security? Take back control with self-hosting.
selfHosted.whySubtitle: Take control of your digital assets and enjoy full data sovereignty
selfHosted.dataSovereigntyDesc: Achieve compliance easily: keep data in your own environment to meet GDPR, HIPAA, and other data residency and audit requirements—no cross-border transfer risks.
selfHosted.securityDesc: Strengthen your defenses: on-premises deployment keeps your data under your control and away from third-party access to sensitive information (e.g., customer data, internal documents).
selfHosted.lowerCostDesc: Reduce costs: no per-seat subscription fees, predictable hardware and ops costs, and no surprise SaaS price hikes.
selfHosted.valueTitle: 1Panel + Open-Source Alternatives = The Best Self-Hosted Solution
selfHosted.valueSubtitle: A modern Linux server management panel that makes self-hosting simple and efficient
selfHosted.fastDesc: One-click deployment with smooth, continuous upgrades
selfHosted.completeDesc: One-stop hub for trusted open-source applications
selfHosted.appsSubtitle: Open-source alternatives for your diverse needs
selfHosted.viewMoreApps: Discover more apps in the 1Panel App Store
